message.content:
@startuml
title Scheduled Events
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "Recording Staff" as RS
actor "Coach" as C
participant "IP/Mobile Cams" as IPC
participant "Consumer Apps" as CA
participant "Security Gateway" as SG
participant "Control Domain\n(win10/linux)" as CD
participant "Streaming Service\n(encoder)" as SS
entity "Media\n(mediaID)" as M
participant "Transfer Service" as TS

RS -> CD : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}})
CA -> SG : authenticate(ID)
SG --> CA : return(token)
IPC -> CD : register(endpoint)
CA -> CD : register(token, priority)
CD -> SS : host(sources{endpoints})
CD -> CD : create(newEvent)
RS -> CD : start(newEvent)
CD -> SS : encode()
CD --> CA : notify(recording)
RS -> CD : stop(newEvent)
CD -> SS : saveAs(mediaID)
SS -> M : save(mediaID)
CD -> TS : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})
CD --> CA : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)

alt auto-download enabled
    CA -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> CA : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else manual-download enabled
    C -> CA : showMedia(token)
    CA -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> CA : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

footer Recording Staff | Coach | IP/Mobile Cams | Consumer Apps | Security Gateway | Control Domain (win10/linux) | Streaming Service (encoder) | Media (mediaID) | Transfer Service
@enduml
